summary: Frontend-only code review completed for ProfilePage.js UX update. All requested features verified: Dreaming cards now clickable with modal, ISO cards still working, status-aware badges in modal, action buttons based on status, no inline 'Actively Searching' button in Dreaming cards. DB has 0 ISO items so visual UI testing was limited, but code structure is correct.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Dreaming cards (lines 700-743) have onClick={() => setIsoModal(item)} and cursor-pointer class - cards are clickable
VERIFIED: Dreaming cards have data-testid='dreaming-item-${item.id}' attribute
VERIFIED: ISO cards (lines 815-863) have onClick={() => setIsoModal(iso)} and cursor-pointer class - cards are clickable
VERIFIED: ISO cards have data-testid='iso-item-${iso.id}' attribute
VERIFIED: Album modal (lines 1091-1250) shows status-aware badge: WISHLIST='DREAMING' (pink), OPEN='ACTIVELY SEEKING' (purple), FOUND='FOUND' (green)
VERIFIED: WISHLIST items show 'Move to Actively Seeking' button (data-testid='iso-modal-promote') and 'Remove' button (data-testid='iso-modal-delete-dream')
VERIFIED: OPEN items show 'Mark as Found' button (data-testid='iso-modal-mark-found') and 'Remove' button (data-testid='iso-modal-delete')
VERIFIED: Dreaming cards do NOT have inline 'Actively Searching' button - grep returns no matches
VERIFIED: Modal shows year with Calendar icon, format, label, catalog number, condition preference, tags (lines 1121-1160)
VERIFIED: Discogs link in modal with data-testid='iso-modal-discogs-link' (lines 1238-1244)
VERIFIED: Calendar icon imported from lucide-react (line 13)
VERIFIED: Frontend compiles without errors (webpack compiled with 1 warning - only exhaustive-deps warnings, no actual errors)

success_rate.backend: N/A - backend testing skipped per request

test_credentials: No specific credentials - app requires auth, code review performed instead
seed_data_creation: None - DB has 0 ISO items per agent context
context_for_next_testing_agent: ProfilePage.js UX update verified via code review. Dreaming tab items now open modal on click (same as ISO items). Modal shows status-aware actions. No inline 'Actively Searching' button on Dreaming cards. DB is empty so visual verification was limited to code inspection. All data-testid attributes are in place for future UI testing.

dreaming_cards_clickable.details: Cards have cursor-pointer class and onClick={() => setIsoModal(item)} handler (line 705-707)

iso_cards_clickable.details: Cards have cursor-pointer class and onClick={() => setIsoModal(iso)} handler (line 823-824)

modal_status_badge_wishlist.details: WISHLIST status shows 'DREAMING' with bg-pink-100 text-pink-700 (lines 1111, 1114)

modal_status_badge_open.details: OPEN status shows 'ACTIVELY SEEKING' with bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 (lines 1112, 1115)

modal_status_badge_found.details: FOUND status shows 'FOUND' with bg-green-100 text-green-700 (lines 1110, 1114)

modal_wishlist_promote_button.details: 'Move to Actively Seeking' button with data-testid='iso-modal-promote' (lines 1183-1196)

dreaming_no_inline_button.details: No 'Actively Searching' or 'Actively Search' text found in Dreaming cards section - inline button removed

modal_calendar_icon_year.details: Year displayed with Calendar icon from lucide-react (lines 1122-1126)

modal_format_label_catno.details: Format (line 1127), label (line 1147), catno (line 1152) shown in modal details

modal_condition_tags.details: Condition preference (line 1142), tags with TagPill (line 1157) shown in modal

modal_discogs_link.details: Discogs link with data-testid='iso-modal-discogs-link' linking to discogs.com/release/{discogs_id} (lines 1238-1244)
